verse_text: So Moses and Aaron did so, as the Lord commanded them. Aaron lifted his hand with the rod and struck the waters in the river, in the sight of Pharaoh and his servants. Then all the waters in the river were turned to blood.

pericope.title: The Plague of Water Turned to Blood

links.context: As in the first plague of Egypt ([[EXO.7:14]]-25), the sea, marine life, and maritime commerce are affected.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: The first bowl is poured out, and the mark of the beast breaks out on those who received it in foul and loathsome sores, like the sixth plague of [[EXO.9:8]]-11. The second (v. 3) and third (v. 4) bowls are like the first plague ([[EXO.7:20]]-21; see [[REV.8:8]]-11).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
